title: The Climb Becomes Survival
description: On pages 24–27, the climb becomes survival as luffy, Sanji, and Nami are caught in Drum Island’s mountain danger as the snow itself becomes an enemy.
scene: The Climb Becomes Survival. Luffy, Sanji, and Nami are caught in Drum Island’s mountain danger as the snow itself becomes an enemy. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You three taste like bad syrup!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They said straw-hat and his crew were climbing the mountains right now, did you forget!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then it's obvious, isn't it!? They've been waiting up in the mountains until we'd show up so they could have their revenge!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So it was them who caused the avalanche just now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is it true all the ropeways to the castle are gone now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, according to the Villagers, your majesty.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then we'll climb up the mountain too!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll teach them what winter warfare is all about!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'll get us up there no matter what...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So don't you dare die on me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Your majesty, look! They're right ahead!

summary: This part centers on the climb becomes survival, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
